title: The 4-Floor 'Intelligence System': How to Actually Use Gemini + NotebookLM
description: A distilled walkthrough of theMITmonk's Gemini + NotebookLM "intelligence system" — the four floors (NotebookLM grounding, Gemini's frontier engine, Gems, and Workspace), the AIM prompt framework, and why the point is meaning, not just mechanics.
